description: AI 뉴스 60초 큐레이션. ChatGPT 스크립트 + HeyGen 얼굴 + Luma B-roll. 카테고리별 시각화 프롬프트 트리.

script_generation_prompt.prompt_template:
다음 AI 뉴스를 60초 한국어 숏폼 영상 스크립트로 변환해줘.

[NEWS_URL 또는 본문 붙여넣기]

요구사항:
- 총 150 단어 내외
- 구조: [0~5초 훅] [5~45초 본문 3포인트] [45~60초 CTA]
- 훅: 충격적/궁금한 한 줄 (예: "이거 진짜 미쳤음")
- 본문: ① 무엇이 달라졌나 ② 한국 사용자 영향 ③ 시장 영향
- CTA: 댓글 유도 + 채널 구독 자연스럽게
- 톤: 친근한 동네 형/누나, 존댓말. 전문 용어는 한 번 풀어 설명
- 영어 약어는 한 번씩 풀어쓰기 (예: "GPT-5, 그러니까 챗지피티 5세대")

broll_prompts.prompt: Macro close-up of a glowing AI processor chip on dark surface, blue and orange light pulses radiating from circuit pathways, slow rotation, cinematic film grain, vertical 9:16
Abstract neural network nodes connecting and lighting up in sequence, holographic blue and white particles flowing through 3D space, dynamic camera flythrough, 9:16
Hands typing on a sleek laptop keyboard, screen showing AI chat interface with text streaming, soft desk lamp light, top-down angle, 9:16
Floating 3D logo of [COMPANY] dissolving into particles and reforming, dark cinematic background, lens flare, 9:16
3D animated bar chart growing upward with floating dollar signs, glassmorphism style, smooth camera dolly, vertical 9:16
Coins falling in slow motion onto a glowing AI chip, blue rim light, dramatic shadows, macro lens, 9:16
Korean person looking at smartphone screen with surprised expression, blurred cafe background, golden hour, 9:16
Modern glass tech building exterior at golden hour, drone shot pulling back, lens flare, vertical 9:16
Empty modern conference room with floating holographic charts above the table, soft ambient lighting, slow camera dolly, 9:16
Two giant 3D logos colliding and merging into one, particles and energy waves, cinematic, dark background, 9:16
Hands using smartphone, AI chat app interface visible, finger taps generate animated response bubbles, top-down view, soft warm lighting, 9:16
Korean office worker at desk, looking at AI-generated content on monitor with focused expression, modern office, 9:16
Multiple holographic app icons floating around a central glowing AI orb, sci-fi aesthetic, particles, 9:16
Seoul cityscape at night with neon lights, drone shot panning across skyline, modern Korean tech aesthetic, 9:16
Korean engineers in modern startup office working on multiple monitors with code and AI visualizations, soft cinematic lighting, 9:16

per_video: 발음 어색 단어 → Pronunciation 기능으로 수정

checklist: 자동 자막 ON + 키워드 오렌지(#FF6B35) 강조
BGM: Lo-fi Tech 또는 Future Bass -22dB

production_checklist: 큐레이션 점수 30점 이상 뉴스 픽 (ai-news-sources.md 점수표)
HeyGen 영상 생성 시작 → 대기하는 동안
월요일 19:00 KST 게시 (또는 뉴스 발생 후 12시간 내)
